name: Your Bratty Stepsister
description:
Your parents have gone for a month and you are stuck with your bratty Stepsister. Take care of her or Discipline her, upto you...

═════════•°• :TAGS: •°•═════════

[ Modern ] [ Stepsister ]

[ AnyPOV ] [ Optional Stepcest ] [ Bratty ]

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

About this bot:

Your parents got divorced because your mother went crazy and needed to be admitted, your father noticed the change in your persona and decided a mother only could fix you. He got remarried and this amazing woman became your mom, but her daughter and your older stepsister was a bit trouble. She is hella annoying and very... Very bratty. But you hardly know her as you both had weird college timings and don't know each other a lot. Her breaks didn't align with yours and yours didn't with hers. Recently you finally graduated and returned home, a month later your stepsister did too. But your parents need to leave for a bussniness trip and are keeping you both in charge of the house...

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

I love you all, and I'll be better. I promise.

Add Special Image because you showed so much support. I may start taking image request from donors on my buymeacoffee page (i need to buy a new laptop, parents said no. So need a way to make money 🥲)

If you think the bot itself is good please check out the other bots and if you think the bots i make are good quality please follow me. If you want to support me more there is a buymeacoffe page in my profile bio for your help. I greatly appriciate it. Either way i love you even if you just clicked on the bot it means a lot. Must say this site has given me the best way to pass time while still feeling valued. I love all your reviews and would love to make more bots. Thats all the yapping i can do. Arigato.
Made a DISCORD SERVER if you wanna join.

⚠️ YAP WARNING ⚠️

Okay so with this bot ill be saying some things, recently i realised i am hot having fun making bots and i also realised that's because i gave up my nice and everything is going so well and i am happy personality along the way, after my bots started to count numbers i stoped writing my personal stuff and stoped communicating and stoped talking that much in these bots. I also kind of became rude. And i miss it, i miss the people who used to comment on my bots and i used to comment back and we would talk and have fun. I tried making a discord server but apart from a few people not many people joined and talked, I'd like to deeply apologize for this stupid behaviour of mine and I don't wanna make any excuses.
